top_patterns.description: Opens with personal insight or gratitude, then invites engagement or action.
top_patterns.structure_template: Reflective statement + specific activity or event + call to action or question
top_patterns.when_it_appears: frequently in updates about events, campaigns, or milestones
example_quotes: Thanks @alliet_ and the whole gang @toms EMEA. Was so awesome to be with you today and feel your energy and deep engagement in our future together. All my love...
As I sit back today and reflect, I’m blown away by how far we have come. None of this would have been possible without you, #TOMStribe.

top_patterns.description: Shares a recent experience or event, often with gratitude or acknowledgment.
top_patterns.structure_template: Description of event/experience + acknowledgment or thanks
top_patterns.when_it_appears: during event recaps or milestone posts
example_quotes: Great having @robinsharma speak at our @toms global brand conference. He inspired us all! Started my 20/20/20 this morning!
Thank you @glamourmag for letting me share my paternity leave story with your readers.

top_patterns.description: Uses hashtags to promote campaigns or themes, often with a call to participate.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: during campaign periods or awareness drives
example_quotes: #withoutshoes in #milan. This year we wanted to celebrate One Day Without Shoes in a big way.
Going #withoutshoes for @toms in Taipei today and just got the whole audience to do it too!

archetypal_structures.formula: Thank you + reflection on impact or journey
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Express appreciation and acknowledge progress or community
example_quotes: Thanks @alliet_ and the whole gang @toms EMEA. Was so awesome to be with you today and feel your energy and deep engagement in our future together.
As I sit back today and reflect, I’m blown away by how far we have come.

archetypal_structures.formula: Highlight of event + personal reaction or action
example_quotes: Great having @robinsharma speak at our @toms global brand conference. He inspired us all!
Thanks @glamourmag for letting me share my paternity leave story.

archetypal_structures.formula: Campaign hashtag + call to participate or share

language_habits.line_break_style: minimal, often no line breaks, or after a single thought

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Creates intimacy and authenticity, invites community engagement
example_quotes: Thanks @alliet_ and the whole gang @toms EMEA.
As I sit back today and reflect, I’m blown away by how far we have come.

voice_tells.tell: Use of hashtags to promote campaigns
voice_tells.why_it_matters: Builds community and awareness around causes

example_quotes: My birthday girl just revealed a new hidden talent.
Just hanging with my little man.

anti_patterns: Overly promotional language without personal touch
Lack of personal voice or reflection

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Authentic, community-focused, personal reflection with campaign integration
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct, concise, emotionally engaged, less formal
